2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237024Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237232Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237556Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237663Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237797Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8237873Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8238048Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-04-07T09:19:21.8238121Z [36;1mfi[0m
